title: wan-envelope-v1
description: Logical envelope for P3 WAN transport (HTTP bridge → NATS JetStream, etc.). See docs/MESH_PLANETARY_P3_TRANSPORT.md and docs/openapi/transport-bridge-v1.yaml.

schema.description: Optional explicit type tag for consumers and logs.

targetHandle.description: Optional P1 registry handle when target origin is unknown.

payload.description: Opaque or structured payload; bounded size is policy on publishers.
